content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Require keyboard, semantics, reflow, focus, status, non-color, content-safety, and assistive-technology evidence for core reader tasks.

hints: For Feed aggregation and TypeScript Defend the Feed Ts Inclusive Outcomes model · Theory Feed Ts Inclus…, name the reader, publisher, source and emitted revision, Node, TypeScript, tenant, URL, unknown XML, runtime validation, Fetch, Promise, AbortSignal, PostgreSQL, Express, handle, accessibility, recovery, and native-transfer boundary, Feed Ts Inclusive Outcomes precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Feed aggregation and TypeScript Defend the Feed Ts Inclusive Outcomes model · Theory Feed Ts Inclus…, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A theory TypeScript team handles case 7893 during a clean emitted-package and restore smoke. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to gate reader, publisher, inclusive, privacy, and changed-case product outcomes; the release claim must bind source, compiler, emitted JavaScript, migrations, lockfile, package, image, configuration, and restored state; then inject one URL, DNS, redirect, stream, compression, timeout, abort, or publisher-budget failure and settle ownership. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, fast-xml-parser, Express, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, handle and load claims, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Require keyboard, semantics, reflow, focus, status, non-color, content-safety, and assistive-technology evidence for core reader tasks.

For Feed aggregation and TypeScript Defend the Feed Ts Inclusive Outcomes model · Theory Feed Ts Inclus…, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Backend projects have no accessibility outcomes.

checks.description: The cumulative typescript portfolio contains this competency’s named evidence increment.
checks.failureMessage: Add the exact evidence marker // Evidence: feed-ts-inclusive-outcomes-c59ih2.

checks.pattern: // Evidence: feed-ts-inclusive-outcomes-c59ih2(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?function\s+evidence_feed_ts_inclusive_outcomes_c59ih2\s*\([^)]*\)\s*:\s*Readonly<\{[^}]+\}>\s*\{(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?readerTasks < 7)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?provenTasks < 6 \|\| provenTasks > readerTasks)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?publisherCases < 5)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?accessibilityDefects > 0)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return)(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return
